action.reasoning: Observation: Fresh start, no files yet. Analysis: This is a protein fitness prediction task (regression). The key challenge is extrapolation from low-order to high-order mutants. ESM2 protein language models are pre-downloaded and perfect for this. I'll use ESM2-150M as backbone with a regression head. Strategy: 1) Extract ESM2 embeddings for the mutation region (positions 561-588) or full sequence, 2) Fine-tune with regression head. Let me start with a quick baseline: freeze ESM2, train only regression head, then submit eval to measure timing. I'll use mean pooling of ESM2 embeddings.
